evidence.q1: sequential 1-18; cross-reference: 'the limitation in Section 16 does not apply to claims under Section 13 or Section 14.'
evidence.q2: 'Customer Data' means information...; 'Security Incident' means... defined once and used consistently.
evidence.q3: 'within thirty days', 'within 72 hours', 'forty-five days' — no vague time terms.
evidence.q5: 'Vendor will perform the services in a professional and workmanlike manner...' grammatically sound.
evidence.q6: consistent modern register, e.g., 'perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, royalty-free license' and 'undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice.'
